name: Lead Tracker — Order Placed Celebration → Slack
_purpose: Triggered by status-change router. Posts a celebratory message in #leads with the order amount, plus an internal-only message to the agency channel that includes the projected payout (15% of first order — hidden from McKenzie's view).

parameters.text: 💰 *Payout owed (internal)* — {{$json.contactName || $json.email}} ({{$json.campaign}}): order {{$json.amountFormatted}}, projected payout *{{$json.payoutFormatted}}* @ 15%. Payout column still hidden in the McKenzie view per Ryan.
